{{Quote|I'll take it to the blaster skill event where I hope to see Wesau T'orrin of Rezi-9 win.|A visitor to [[Uso Yso's swoop shop]] places a bet on Wesau T'orrin|<ref name="JQ">''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]''</ref>}}
'''Rezi-9''' was an astronomical object<ref name="JQ" /> located within the [[Rezi system/Legends|Rezi system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Bajic sector/Legends|Bajic sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Wesau T'orrin]], an individual participating in the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] skill event of the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] on the<ref name="JQ" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC Euceron">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Euceron system/Legends|Euceron system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Euceron]]<ref name="JQ" /> in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref> was from Rezi-9.<ref name="JQ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rezi-9 was first mentioned in the [[2002]] young reader novel ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'', which was authored by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="JQ" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Rezi [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Rezi-9, in grid square P-17.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1stm}}
